articles.title: Momentum: Why The Bitcoin Train Is Ready To Leave The Station
articles.description: The latest Bitcoin price action has pushed momentum into the positive on just about every timeframe that matters: From today the daily through the monthly. If these signals confirm with a June monthly close, the train might have officially left the station when it comes to the next crypto bull run. BTCUSD Momentum Builds Across Multiple Timeframes Imagine a train that’s come to a complete...

articles.title: Bitcoin Risks Crashing To $20,000 Amid BlackRock Spot BTC ETF Filing, Warns Bloomberg Analyst
articles.description: Bloomberg's senior macro strategist, Mike McGlone, has cautioned that Bitcoin may slide further, despite BlackRock's recent application for a Bitcoin exchange-traded fund (ETF) boosting BTC’s price.

articles.title: What Binance’s regulatory hiccups mean for BNB’s future
articles.description: As Binance grapples with potential withdrawal in Belgium due to regulatory pressure, the fate of BNB might also be hanging in the balance.

articles.title: Cardano Co-Founder Charles Hoskinson Clears the Air: ‘I Never Worked for Ripple’
articles.description: On Friday (23 June 2023), Charles Hoskinson, a Co-Founder of Ethereum and Cardano, addressed an online rumor about his alleged past as an intern at Ripple. articles.title: Bitcoin Monthly Volume Surpasses Yearly Average, Why This Is Bullish
articles.description: Data shows the Bitcoin monthly average trading volume has now surpassed the yearly average one. Here’s why this may be bullish for the asset.
